title: Project Safety, Export, Update and Onboarding Polish
delivery: A bounded session recovery journal captures the newest valid project before the debounced IndexedDB save completes.
A lifecycle flush is called on hidden, pagehide and beforeunload transitions; a journal is restored only when newer than the persisted project.
Every export saves the active project first and WebP safely falls back to PNG on browsers that cannot encode WebP.
Backup download URLs remain alive for Android delayed download handling and updates refuse to navigate if the save result is unsuccessful.
Onboarding supports touch swipe, keyboard navigation and focus restoration while preserving the existing premium RTL UI.
privacy: Recovery journals are session-scoped, size-bounded and local. AIR-DROW never uploads drawing data unless the creator explicitly uses a sharing or AI action.
